title: Rebuilt Industries
description: Iron Man and Other Tech related Superheroes Addon for Palladium
body:
### ❌ Incompatible with Optifine use Embeddium/Rubidium instead.
## ❓ What is Rebuilt Industries
Ever wanted to Experience stylized Iron Man in Minecraft?\
Rebuilt Industries is an Addon for [ThreeTAG's Palladium](https://modrinth.com/mod/threetag-palladium) mod for both Fabric and Forge.
## 🔧 Current Content
Currently Rebuilt Industries adds 2 Iron Man Suits and 2 Batteries for Suits
## ⚙️ More
Some items in the Addon requires RF/Energy, use Mods like Mekanism.\
**[JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)** or **[REI](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei)** is recommended.\
Detailed Information on [Wiki](https://trello.com/b/jU8kroHZ/rebuilt-industries)
